_comment: Alert-rule family map for the NOVELTY signature (INV-02: loadable/git-reviewed data, never a Go literal). The SAME physical fault surfaces under several source rule names; the novelty gate keys on the rule, so without this a de-novel under one alias never covers the others. Each family lists the source rule strings (case-insensitive, trimmed) that denote the same remediation-warranting condition. Editing this changes ONLY the novelty MATCH — never what actuates, never any other gate.
